_sources.discrepancies: NCSL lists TN as 'strict photo ID'. SoS confirms voters without acceptable photo ID must vote a provisional ballot; provisional ballot is not counted unless voter presents acceptable ID by the close of business on the second business day after the election. Consistent.

earlyVoting.notes: Early voting begins 20 days before the primary and ends 5 days before. Hours and sites set by county. TODO verify for 2026 cycle.
Early voting begins 20 days before and ends 5 days before Election Day. TODO verify for 2026 cycle.
Early voting runs from 20 days to 5 days before Election Day. Hours and locations vary by county.

acceptedIds: Tennessee driver's license or photo ID card
Photo ID issued by Tennessee or federal government
Tennessee handgun carry permit with photo
Photo ID issued by a Tennessee college or university
votingRules.expirationRule: Photo ID must not be expired at time of voting. TODO verify for 2026 cycle.
votingRules.impedimentDeclaration: Strict photo ID state: voters without acceptable photo ID must cast a provisional ballot and present acceptable ID to the county election commission by close of business on the second business day after the election for it to be counted.
votingRules.phonesAtPollsDetail: Tennessee prohibits the use of mobile phones in the voting booth. You may not photograph your marked ballot.
additionalRules: Open primary: any registered voter may choose which party's primary to vote in; party registration is not required.
No legislative primary runoffs in Tennessee.

eligibility: Will be outside the county on Election Day and during the early voting period
Have a specific illness or physical disability
Hospitalized as an emergency patient within 5 days before the election
A caretaker of a person confined due to illness or disability
A resident of a licensed care facility
Enrolled in college outside the county
voteByMail.applicationDeadline: Must be received by the county election commission 7 days before the election
voteByMail.returnDeadline: Must be received by the county election commission by the close of polls on Election Day
voteByMail.returnDeadlinePlain: Absentee ballot must arrive at the county election commission by the close of polls on Election Day.
